import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome'; import { faArrowRight } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'; import { products, journalImage, serumImage, moisturizerImage } from '../data/products'; import { useWishlist } from '../context/WishlistContext'; import './HomePage.css'; import heroImage from "screen.png"; function useReveal() { useEffect(() => { const observer = new IntersectionObserver( entries => entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('reveal-active'); }), { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -60px 0px' } ); document.querySelectorAll('.reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-up').forEach(el => observer.observe(el)); return () => observer.disconnect(); }, []); } export default function HomePage() { useReveal(); const { addToWishlist } = useWishlist(); const recommended = products.slice(0, 4); return (
